## What are you trying to do?

## What have you already tried?

<!-- Commands you ran, docs you read, search terms you used. This helps
     us point you at the right page (or notice if a page is missing). -->

## Where you've already looked

The handbook (linked from the README) covers most rules and CLI questions:

- [Getting Started](https://mcp-tool-shop-org.github.io/sovereignty/handbook/getting-started/)
- [How to Play](https://mcp-tool-shop-org.github.io/sovereignty/handbook/how-to-play/)
- [Beginners](https://mcp-tool-shop-org.github.io/sovereignty/handbook/beginners/)
- [Reference (CLI commands)](https://mcp-tool-shop-org.github.io/sovereignty/handbook/reference/)
- [Diary Mode (XRPL anchoring)](https://mcp-tool-shop-org.github.io/sovereignty/handbook/diary-mode/)

If the answer should be in the handbook but isn't, that itself is a useful
report — please mention it below.
